fields.summary: Introduce a dominant resource based schedule policy to increase the resource utilization, avoid heavy cluster resource fragments.

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: When we schedule in multi node lookup policy for async scheduling, or just use heartbeat update based scheduling, we both meet scheduling fragments. When cpu-intensive jobs or gpu-intensive or memory-intensive etc, the cluster will meet heavy waste of resources, so this issue will help to move scheduler support dominant resource based schedule, to help our cluster get better resource utilization, also in order to load balance nodemanager resource distribution.

comments.body:
[~leftnoteasy] [~tangzhankun] [~prabhujoseph] [~sunil.govind@gmail.com] [~jiwq]

If you any advice about this proposal.

I submit a draft patch to support async multi node scheduling mode in CS, but i think in heartbeat schedule mode in CS/FS, we also should to handle resource resource fragments, to help get better resource utilization.
